login.title: Sign in to your account
login.name: Name
login.signupSuccess: Account created! Check your email to confirm your registration.

home.subtitle: Organize your projects quickly with AI and manual editing.

notice.localStorageLine: This version is persisting data in your browser (local storage). It is a test version to collect feedback and improve the system.
notice.discordLine: For support, questions, and suggestions, join our Discord:

projects.title: Your Projects
projects.limitWarning: Limit approaching: {{projectsLeft}} project(s) and {{sectionsLeft}} section(s) left on the Free plan.
projects.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove project "{title}"?
projects.confirmBackup: Do you want to create a local backup of "{title}" before deleting?
projects.confirmDeleteWithoutBackup: Backup could not be generated. Do you want to delete anyway?

syncBar.creditsPerProjectHint: Credits per project when you open a project

profile.title: Profile and plan
profile.subtitle: Your current plan and usage limits.

limits.projects: Free plan limit: you can have at most 2 projects.
limits.sectionsPerProject: Free plan limit: maximum 120 sections per project.
limits.sectionsTotal: Free plan limit: maximum 200 sections in your account.

errors.minLength: Project name must have at least 3 characters.

projectDetail.sectionsSubtitle: Search, browse, and reorder top-level sections with drag and drop.
projectDetail.searchPlaceholder: 🔍 Search sections by title or content...
projectDetail.rootSectionDuplicate: A root section with this name already exists.
projectDetail.relationsSuggestHint: Uses section tags (Combat, Economy, Items…) to suggest connections.

aiMenu.title: AI actions
aiMenu.improveHint: Improve content (✨) available on each section page.
aiMenu.relationsEmpty: No suggestions yet. Add tags (Combat, Economy, Items…) to sections on each section page.
aiMenu.consistencyEmpty: No alerts. Add design numbers (HP, damage, costs, XP) in sections for the AI to analyze.
aiMenu.configRequired: Configure your API key in AI Settings.

analysis.runHint: Click "Run analysis" to analyze consistency and balance.

relations.runHint: Click "Run analysis" to suggest relations between systems (combat, economy, progression, etc.).

assignTags.title: Assign tags to sections
assignTags.allHaveTags: All sections already have tags. Nothing to do.
assignTags.hint: AI will classify each section into domains (combat, economy, progression, items, etc.) to improve relation suggestions and analyses.

sectionEdit.title: Edit Section
sectionEdit.resetColorTitle: Reset to the default level color
sectionEdit.customColorActive: ✨ Custom color enabled. Use 'Reset' to return to the default hierarchy level color.
sectionEdit.defaultColorHint: Using the default level color. Click the picker or type a code to customize.
sectionEdit.aiHelpPrefix: AI will improve content while preserving existing
sectionEdit.insertFromDriveHint: Use the Drive image button in the toolbar. The image must be shared as "Anyone with the link" to appear in the document.
sectionEdit.driveNotConfigured: Google Drive not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to your environment variables (see documentation). On Vercel, after adding the variable, trigger a new deploy (Redeploy) for it to take effect.
sectionEdit.drivePasteHint: Image link copied. Paste in the editor with Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V on Mac).

errors.exportFailed: Error exporting document. Please try again.

errors.apiConnection: Failed to connect to API. Please try again.
errors.enterModification: Type what you want to modify.

sectionDetail.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this section?
sectionDetail.confirmDeleteWithChildren: Are you sure you want to delete this section and its {count} subsection(s)?

subsections.title: Subsections
subsections.duplicate: A subsection with this name already exists.

ai.unresolvedRefsTitle: References that don't exist as sections yet
ai.createSectionHint: Choose where to create each section: here as a subsection, at project root, or under another section.

move.cannotBeOwnParent: A section cannot be its own parent.
move.cannotMoveToDescendant: You cannot move a section into one of its descendants.
move.makeRoot: Make it a top-level section (no parent)

deleteProject.title: Delete project
deleteProject.description: This action cannot be undone. To confirm, type the project name below.

mindmapShareMembers.title: Share project (members)
mindmapShareMembers.description: Invite people by email to edit this project. They share the same project sync quota.
mindmapShareMembers.removeConfirm: Remove this member? They will lose access to the project.
mindmapShareMembers.publicSharingOwnerOnly: Only the project owner can create or change the public share link.
mindmapShareMembers.publicLinkMemberHint: You can copy and share this link. Only the owner can generate or change the token.

aiPage.title: AI Settings
aiPage.subtitle: Configure your own API key to use AI features

errors.invalidKey: Please enter a valid API key

confirm.clear: Are you sure you want to remove your AI settings?

status.activeDescription: You are using your own API key. All AI features are available.
status.missingDescription: Configure an API key to use the app's AI features.

form.providerHint: Groq offers a generous free tier and is the most recommended

howTo.title: How to get your API key:

groq.step3: Open "API Keys" and create a new key

claude.step3: Open "API Keys" and create a new key

security.title: Security and Privacy
security.item1: Your API key is stored only in your browser (localStorage)
security.item2: The key is never sent to our servers or shared
security.item3: Only you can access your key
security.item4: If you clear your browser cache, you will need to configure it again

persistencePage.title: Persistence and Sync
persistencePage.subtitle: Adjust autosave and cloud sync triggers.
persistencePage.errorHintNetwork: To see the full error: F12 → Network tab → click the failed 'sync' request (500) → Response tab.
persistencePage.errorSupabaseNonJson: Supabase returned a non-JSON response (e.g. HTML page). Common causes: project paused in Supabase dashboard; in production, wrong URL/keys in Vercel environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY). Check Supabase and, if using Vercel, the project env vars.

form.debounceHint: When automatic sync is on, delay after edit before scheduling upload.
form.autosaveHint: When automatic sync is on, sends changes every X ms. Recommended: 30000 (30s).
form.syncAutomaticHint: Off (default): sync only when you click "Sync now". On: sends changes periodically using the interval below.

syncBadge.previewClickHint: Click to see what will be synced

credits.title: Cloud sync credits
credits.howItWorks: Each section created or updated (title, content, etc.) = 1 credit. Reordering multiple sections = 1 credit total. Each section deleted = 1 credit.
